# Engine Session Flush Compaction Boundary

> For agentic workers: REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: use
> `superpowers:writing-plans` before implementation. Use
> `superpowers:test-driven-development` for code or executable behavior and
> `superpowers:verification-before-completion` before claiming completion.

## Stage

- Name: engine-session-flush-compaction-boundary
- Date: 2026-05-19
- Integration branch: `codex/refactor-architecture`
- Child branch: `codex/refactor-engine-session-flush-compaction-boundary`
- Child worktree: `../opensquilla-refactor-active`
- Owner: Codex main thread for architecture boundary, worker dispatch, review,
  merge integration, full gates, stage records, and cleanup.

## Goal

Refactor the remaining engine/session memory flush hot paths as one cohesive,
behavior-compatible batch while keeping file ownership disjoint enough for
parallel workers:

- engine pre-history compaction orchestration for T3 upgrade and generic
  preflight compaction;
- gateway reset lock consistency when no flush service is available;
- agent background memory flush completion/backoff semantics.

The batch must preserve public CLI/RPC/WebSocket behavior, session payload
shapes, memory flush safety semantics, and provider/model routing defaults.

    config wiring, and history load timing.
  - `SessionManager` remains persistence/compaction owner.
  - Gateway lifecycle handlers adapt session-domain results into RPC payloads
    and errors while using session-domain lock helpers.

## Boundary decision

- Module batch:
  - Engine preflight/T3 memory flush compaction orchestration.
  - Gateway reset lifecycle lock consistency for no-flush-service reset.
  - Agent background memory flush completion/backoff semantics.
- Responsibilities moving out:
  - From `TurnRunner`: duplicated T3/generic pre-compaction transcript loading,
    flush execution, receipt validation, compaction config construction, and
    status branching into an engine-owned preflight coordinator.
  - From `handle_sessions_reset`: no-flush-service reset body must use the same
    session lock boundary as the flush-enabled path.
  - From inline `Agent` completion paths: centralize background flush outcome
    consumption so callback and await paths cannot double-log or clear backoff
    incorrectly.
- Responsibilities staying in place:
  - `TurnRunner` keeps provider/model resolution, `AgentConfig` construction,
    `TurnContext` creation, and history load timing.
  - `SessionManager` keeps transcript persistence and compaction persistence.
  - `preserve_lifecycle_memory`, `execute_lifecycle_flush`, and
    `run_with_session_lock` stay stable unless a worker proves a tiny caller
    adapter is needed.
  - Task runtime active-task persistence stays out of this batch.
- New module/file responsibility:
  - `src/opensquilla/engine/preflight_compaction.py` owns pre-history
    compaction orchestration helpers for T3 upgrade and generic preflight.
  - No new gateway/session module is planned for reset lock consistency; use the
    existing `run_with_session_lock` pattern.
  - No new agent module is planned unless Worker C proves a focused helper is
    clearer than a local method.
- Public behavior that must not change:
  - Current T3 `flush_failed` fallback to generic preflight remains compatible
    unless a RED test explicitly changes it and the stage record calls out the
    behavior change.
  - T3 `handled` and `compact_failed` must not run a second generic threshold
    path.
  - Generic preflight skip/trigger behavior, cron/subagent skipping, circuit
    breaker behavior, degraded receipt rejection, backfilled receipt allowance,
    flush-disabled behavior, timeout propagation, provider-backed
    `CompactionConfig`, and legacy compact-manager compatibility.
  - `sessions.reset` RPC method name, scopes, response keys, epoch behavior,
    force/admin policy, flush-unavailable details, and no-flush reset behavior
    except for lock serialization.
  - Background flush timeout/backoff must prevent immediate retrigger and must
    not emit duplicate or misleading terminal logs.
- Files explicitly out of scope:
  - `src/opensquilla/memory/session_flush.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/storage.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/gateway/task_runtime.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/rpc_payload.py`
  - Web UI static assets
  - Provider, channels, tools, scheduler, skills, search, and CLI internals.

## Worker ownership

### Worker A: Engine Preflight/T3 Coordinator

- Owns:
  - create `src/opensquilla/engine/preflight_compaction.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/engine/runtime.py` only around
    `_maybe_compact_on_t3_upgrade`, `_maybe_preflight_compact`, pre-compaction
    helper delegation, and run-time branching between T3/generic preflight
  - `tests/test_engine/test_preflight_compaction.py`
  - `tests/test_engine/test_t3_upgrade_compaction.py`
- Must not edit:
  - `src/opensquilla/engine/agent.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/gateway/rpc_session_lifecycle.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/**`
  - `src/opensquilla/memory/session_flush.py`
- RED tests:
  - coordinator module does not exist and `TurnRunner` owns preflight/T3
    orchestration inline;
  - T3 handled path does not run generic threshold/token estimation;
  - T3 `flush_failed` preserves the existing generic preflight fallback
    contract;
  - receipt policy is shared by T3 and generic preflight.
- Focused GREEN:
  - `uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_engine/test_preflight_compaction.py tests/test_engine/test_t3_upgrade_compaction.py -q`

### Worker B: Gateway Reset Lock Consistency

- Owns:
  - `src/opensquilla/gateway/rpc_session_lifecycle.py` reset no-flush branch
    only
  - `tests/test_gateway/test_rpc_sessions.py`
  - `tests/test_gateway/test_rpc_session_lifecycle_boundary.py` only if an AST
    ownership assertion needs updating
- Must not edit:
  - `src/opensquilla/engine/**`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/lifecycle_memory.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/lifecycle_flush.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/lifecycle_service.py`
- RED tests:
  - `sessions.reset` with `flush_service=None` waits for the session lock
    before transcript preservation and reset apply.
  - forced no-flush reset with admin scope also serializes transcript check and
    rotation under the lock.
- Focused GREEN:
  - `uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_gateway/test_rpc_sessions.py::TestSessionsReset tests/test_gateway/test_rpc_session_lifecycle_boundary.py -q`

### Worker C: Agent Background Flush Completion

- Owns:
  - `src/opensquilla/engine/agent.py` only around `_active_flush_task`,
    `_run_flush`, `_mark_flush_task_completed`, and timeout/backoff completion
    handling
  - `tests/test_memory_flush.py`
- Must not edit:
  - `src/opensquilla/engine/runtime.py`
  - `src/opensquilla/gateway/**`
  - `src/opensquilla/session/**`
  - `src/opensquilla/memory/session_flush.py`
- RED tests:
  - service failure enters or preserves retry backoff and does not log
    misleading completion;
  - done callback and await path emit one terminal outcome;
  - delayed success after timeout does not clear retry backoff early.
- Focused GREEN:
  - `uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_memory_flush.py -q`

Workers are not alone in the codebase. Preserve edits made by other workers,
do not revert unrelated changes, and stop rather than editing outside ownership.

## Rollback

- Revert the integration merge commit if the slice regresses T3/generic
  preflight compaction, session reset payloads, lock behavior, memory flush
  backoff, or background flush completion semantics.
- Keep the child branch for diagnosis until a replacement slice is ready.
- Do not rewrite `main` or unrelated worktrees.
